info.title: Sufrix API
info.description: Sufrix POS — multi-tenant cafe and restaurant management. The Rust backend is the source of truth for this spec; the Flutter teller app and React management dashboard consume the generated openapi.json.

parameters.name: org_id
parameters.description: Organization whose branches to list. Must match the caller's JWT org.

200.description: List of branches in the organization

400.description: Bad request — validation failed or malformed input

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid bearer token

403.description: Forbidden — insufficient permission or wrong org

409.description: Conflict — FK or domain invariant violation

parameters.name: org_id
parameters.description:
Filter to a specific organization. Optional for super-admins
(who see all orgs when omitted); required-by-policy for everyone
else (overridden server-side to the caller's own org).

org_logo_url.description: Convenience field — populated from the parent org's `logo_url`.

printer_port.description: TCP port for the receipt printer. Defaults to `9100` if absent.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name. Defaults to `Africa/Cairo` if absent.

logo.description:
Logo image file. PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Optional — omit the field
entirely to create the org without a logo.

branch_ids.description:
Branches to assign the new user to immediately. Branch managers
can only assign to branches they themselves are assigned to.

email.description: Required for admins and managers; ignored for tellers.

password.description:
Required when `role` is anything other than `teller`. Plain text;
hashed server-side with bcrypt before storage.

ErrorBody.description:
Wire shape of every error JSON. Keep in lockstep with
`AppError::error_response` below.

tax_rate.description:
Tax rate as a decimal (e.g. `0.14` for 14% VAT).
Stored as `BigDecimal` internally; transmitted as a JSON number.

UpdateBranchRequest.description:
PATCH-style update. Fields fall into three categories:

- **Absent** from JSON → keep existing value.
- **Present as `null`** (only the `printer_*` fields) → clear the column.
- **Present as a value** → set to that value.

OpenAPI cannot express the absent-vs-null distinction cleanly, so all
fields are documented as optional and nullable. Clients targeting this
endpoint should send only the fields they want to change.

logo_url.description:
`null` clears the logo; absent leaves it unchanged. To set a new
logo, use `PUT /orgs/{id}/logo` (multipart) instead — JSON updates
only accept the clear-to-null case here.

oneOf.description:
Only org-admins and above can change roles. Promoting to
`super_admin` requires the caller to be a super-admin.

logo.description: Logo image file. PNG, JPEG, or WebP. Required.

bearer_jwt.description: JWT obtained from `POST /auth/login` (email/password) or `POST /auth/pin-login` (teller PIN). Send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Email/password and PIN login, JWT issuance.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User accounts, roles, and branch assignments.

tags.name: permissions
tags.description: Role permissions and per-user permission overrides.

tags.name: menu
tags.description: Categories, menu items, sizes, and addon groups.

tags.name: recipes
tags.description: Org-level recipes referencing the ingredient catalog.

tags.name: inventory
tags.description: Org-level ingredient catalog and branch-level stock.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Order lifecycle, split payments, voids, aggregator handling.

tags.name: shifts
tags.description: Shift open/close, cash reconciliation, printable reports.

tags.name: menu_advisor
tags.description: Read-only pricing, bundle, and removal suggestions. Never edits menus — the differentiator vs. generic POS.
